name: Patty's Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
Since this is tomato season, and Epona has balsamic vinegar, I am posting this recipe. First a little background...I'm one of those guys that really likes to collect recipes from girls. I don't know why, but even when all else has passed, I'm left with a good recipe.
1. Chop the tomatoes and onions into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the chopped tomatoes, onions, balsamic vinegar, basil, parsley, garlic, salt, pepper, and oregano. Mix to taste.
3. Marinate the mixture for a few hours before serving.
4. This is a nice dish that pairs well with most Italian dishes. I like having it on the side with steak.
